title: Career Opportunity Teacher at Pratham Education

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Teacher at Pratham Education
jsonLd.description:
Join the Pratham Education family as a Teacher in Pune. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Pratham Education:
Pratham Education is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Support students with special educational needs
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Pratham Education!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
